title: Ensure compliance with pest legislation
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Ensure compliance with pest legislation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify non-compliance with legislation

pcs.text: Identify and record alleged non-compliance with pest control legislation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record alleged non-compliance with pest control legislation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record alleged non-compliance with pest control legislation.

pcs.text: Report allegation to authority according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report allegation to authority according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report allegation to authority according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify non-compliance with legislation

elements.title: Investigate non-compliance

pcs.text: Determine land ownership, identity and responsibility of stakeholders accused of non-compliance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine land ownership, identity and responsibility of stakeholders accused of non-compliance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine land ownership, identity and responsibility of stakeholders accused of non-compliance.

pcs.text: Investigate and collect evidence for alleged non-compliance of pest control legislation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and collect evidence for alleged non-compliance of pest control legislation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and collect evidence for alleged non-compliance of pest control legislation.

pcs.text: Notify stakeholders of non-compliance of pest control legislation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Notify stakeholders of non-compliance of pest control legislation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Notify stakeholders of non-compliance of pest control legislation.

pcs.text: Provide stakeholder with advice and estimates on rectifying non-compliance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide stakeholder with advice and estimates on rectifying non-compliance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide stakeholder with advice and estimates on rectifying non-compliance.

pcs.text: Conduct investigations and communications according to privacy, right of entry, and workplace policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct investigations and communications according to privacy, right of entry, and workplace policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct investigations and communications according to privacy, right of entry, and workplace policies and procedures.

pcs.text: Record investigation activity, actions and advice according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record investigation activity, actions and advice according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record investigation activity, actions and advice according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Investigate non-compliance

elements.title: Act on non-compliance issues

pcs.text: Produce and issue notices of non-compliance to stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Produce and issue notices of non-compliance to stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Produce and issue notices of non-compliance to stakeholders.

pcs.text: Collate investigations, evidence and findings into a final report
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collate investigations, evidence and findings into a final report?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collate investigations, evidence and findings into a final report.

pcs.text: Advise stakeholder of outcomes of investigations and findings according to legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Advise stakeholder of outcomes of investigations and findings according to legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Advise stakeholder of outcomes of investigations and findings according to legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Provide support to stakeholders during implementation of rectifications according to workplace policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide support to stakeholders during implementation of rectifications according to workplace policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide support to stakeholders during implementation of rectifications according to workplace policies and procedures.

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
